148 C3G C3G_NONE_ABOVE (C3G) None of Above Modes of Expression CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: modes of expression - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
149 C4 C4_IS_UNDERSTOOD (C4) Making Self Understood CHAR 1 Communications/hearing patterns: making self understood. 0 = Understood, 1 = Usually Understood - difficulty finding words or finishing thoughts, 2 = Sometimes Understood - ability is limited to making
